name: inventory_module_importable
command: python -c "from aho.council.inventory import CouncilMember, inventory; m = inventory(); assert len(m) >= 7; print(len(m))"

name: all_members_status_unknown
command: python -c "from aho.council.inventory import inventory; m = inventory(); statuses = set(x.status for x in m); assert statuses == {\"unknown\"}; print(\"ok\")"

name: acceptance_schema_strict
command: python -c "from aho.acceptance import AcceptanceResult; r = AcceptanceResult(check_name=\"t\", passed=True, actual_exit=0, actual_output=\"\", matched=None, duration_seconds=0.1, error=None); print(\"ok\")"
